title: Concurrent URL Health Checker
description: Implement a concurrent URL health checker using goroutines. Given a list of URLs (one per line), check each one concurrently. Simulate the health check: a URL is UP if it contains the substring 'healthy', otherwise it is DOWN. Collect all results and return them sorted alphabetically by URL, one result per line in the format 'url STATUS'.
constraints: Use goroutines and a channel or sync.WaitGroup to collect results concurrently
Health check simulation: UP if URL contains 'healthy', else DOWN
Return results sorted alphabetically by URL
Handle empty input by returning empty string

examples.output:
http://api.healthy.example.com UP
http://cache.healthy.example.com UP
http://db.example.com DOWN
examples.explanation: api.healthy and cache.healthy contain 'healthy' so they are UP. db.example.com does not, so it is DOWN. Results are sorted alphabetically.

test_cases.description: Two healthy URLs and one unhealthy, sorted output
test_cases.expected_output:
http://api.healthy.example.com UP
http://cache.healthy.example.com UP
http://db.example.com DOWN

test_cases.description: All URLs contain healthy, all UP
Single URL without healthy is DOWN
